name: filter-quick-switcher-non-file-activity
title: 过滤 Quick Switcher 非文件工具调用
description: OpenSpec add-quick-switcher follow-up：在 recent-file trust boundary 过滤 shell command/pseudo-device 污染，并清理展示层持久化脏记录。
creator: chenxiangning
notes: Quick Switcher recent-file filtering and filename-first layout are implemented and owner-accepted. Focused tests, targeted ESLint, diff check, and strict OpenSpec validation pass. Full-project typecheck was executed but remains blocked by an unrelated concurrent WorkspaceFileComparePanel prop contract change; those files are excluded from this commit.
